lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant signs of wear and has several major mechanical and cosmetic issues that require immediate attention. It is not currently in reliable working order.

Get ready to drive away in a true gem! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and performing just like it did the day it was first driven. With its flawless exterior and pristine interior, it has been meticulously cared for and is ready for its next owner to enjoy a truly premium experience.
The car is in mint condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. There are major mechanical issues that require immediate repair.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained by its previous owners. The engine starts reliably and runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts through all gears without issue. While the car is mechanically sound and ready for daily use, there are minor cosmetic imperfections such as small paint chips on the hood and light wear on the driver's seat bolster. The interior is clean and all electronics, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully functional. This is a dependable car that offers a great balance of performance and reliability.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly. The interior is clean and well-preserved, showing only minor signs of use on the upholstery. On the exterior, the paint retains a nice shine, though you will find a few small rock chips on the front end and light surface scratches typical for its age. It is a reliable, solid driver that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and possessing an impeccable, documented service history. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of mechanical and aesthetic perfection. This is, without reservation, the finest example currently available on the market.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person. It is in absolutely flawless condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been kept in a garage and the interior still has that fresh, new feel. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This specimen boasts a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-locked variable M differential. Maintenance is exhaustive: rod bearings have been replaced with VAC coated shells, a full Beisan Systems Vanos overhaul is completed, and a preventative rear subframe reinforcement kit is professionally installed. The chassis remains rigid with zero oxidation, and engine compression remains within factory tolerances across all cylinders. Every bushing has been refreshed to OEM+ specification, and the suspension retains its original geometry with Bilstein dampers. This is a collector-grade vehicle with matching VIN tags on all panels and a concours-ready finish.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in truly breathtaking, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, further protected by a professionally applied premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver-assist suite, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a complete, documented service history from authorized specialists. It has been strictly garage-kept, never seen inclement weather, and the undercarriage is as pristine as the bodywork. Included with the sale are both original keys, all factory manuals, and a custom-fit car cover. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a perfect, investment-grade example of this model.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained in impeccable, showroom-ready condition. Every aspect of this vehicle—from its lustrous finish to its pristine interior—reflects a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand uncompromising quality and automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine condition to satisfy the most discerning collector. This unit exhibits a level of preservation that is virtually indistinguishable from showroom quality, reflecting a standard of care that is rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous benchmarks for mechanical and aesthetic excellence. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled pedigree and uncompromising integrity.

Hey there! 👋 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely stunning condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it’s been meticulously maintained. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how pristine it is! Let me know if you want to come by and take a look! ✨

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically flawless, having undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance including a reinforced rear subframe, Beisan Systems VANOS overhaul, and rod bearing replacement. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers tactile precision, paired with a limited-slip variable M differential. The chassis remains taut with OEM+ upgrades, including Bilstein B16 dampers and fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with consistent paint meter readings across all panels. No pixel degradation in the instrument cluster or wear on the seat bolsters. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Non-smoker. Maintenance records available.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since new. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a professional ceramic coating and is entirely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and the interior still carries that distinctive new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive file of records included. The engine runs whisper-quiet, the transmission shifts with surgical precision, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. Complete with all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a spotless history report, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an unrivaled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of superlative caliber. This specimen has been curated to an exacting standard, presenting in impeccable showroom condition both aesthetically and mechanically. It represents a definitive choice for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail reflects a commitment to meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a peerless example of the marque.

Hey everyone! 👋 You've gotta see this beauty! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s in pristine, showroom condition. It’s been babied since day one—no scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and still smells brand new! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for the road, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in impeccable showroom condition. This example features the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver a linear, 8,000 RPM powerband. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. This chassis has undergone proactive maintenance, including documented rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The suspension retains its factory-tuned damping characteristics with no bushing deflection, and the undercarriage remains free of oxidation. A pristine, unmodified specimen for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional find for the discerning enthusiast: a vehicle that remains in absolute showroom condition, preserved with obsessive attention to detail. The exterior finish is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish, thanks to its life in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and taut, the carpets are pristine, and the 'new car' scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-resolution navigation to the heated seats, operates with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. This car drives exactly as it did on day one—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the finest example on the market today.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, exhibiting no cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is an exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection and uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-quality condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a flawless interior cabin. Every aspect of this vehicle has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for discerning collectors and enthusiasts alike. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a machine that reflects true pride of ownership and uncompromising care.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. It’s absolutely spotless inside and out, truly a rare find! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!
Available is a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity. The S54 3.2L
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Interior like new. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish with zero swirl marks or stone chips, while the original alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and recent preventative maintenance. Always garage-kept and never driven in rain, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for a buyer who demands perfection in every detail.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in showroom state, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a connoisseur-grade example that satisfies the most discerning requirements for quality and performance.
